text: As you wrack your mind for possible locations about the key you realize you can’t think of a single spot. You spend hours standing there trying to recall every interaction you have had with your Ex-Boss but you can’t remember a single thing. Hours have passed and when you next look up the sun has risen high in the sky, with a sinking feeling in your gut you turn around to see 2 guards staring at you. One says “I’m Yasaton, an undercover guard and you're under arrest!”
